name: tn-get-action-result

outputs.description: Date The action result time. Tanium.ActionResult.max_available_age
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.now

outputs.description: The maximum action result age. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.age The age of the action result.
outputs.name: String

outputs.description: The result sets ID. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.report_count The result sets report count.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.id

outputs.description: The result sets saved question ID. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.question_id The result sets question ID.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.saved_question_id

outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.archived_question_id

outputs.description: The result sets issued seconds. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.expire_seconds The result sets expire seconds.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.issue_seconds

outputs.description: The result sets tested. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.passed The result sets passed.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.tested

outputs.description: The result sets mr tested. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.mr_passed The result sets mr passed.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.mr_tested

outputs.description: The result sets estimated total. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.select_count The result sets select count.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.estimated_total

outputs.description: The result sets error count. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.no_results_count The result sets no results count.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.error_count

outputs.description: The result sets columns hash. Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.columns.name The result sets columns name.
outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.columns.hash

outputs.name: Tanium.ActionResult.result_sets.row_count_machines
